# Aviv Msika

Aviv Msika is a multidisciplinary creative professional operating at the intersection of strategy and visual artistry — a Social Media Manager, Creative Strategist, professional photographer, and video editor who handles projects entirely in-house from concept to production. The brand exudes an artistic, chic, and business-savvy identity tailored for high-end lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce clients. The aesthetic vision is luminous and sophisticated — think clean typography, generous white space, and a softly feminine palette of cream, white, and muted sage green — designed to communicate both creative excellence and strategic authority.

Source: https://example.com

---

Social Media Management & Creative Strategy


# Strategy-led creativity.Visually told.


### Aviv Msika crafts immersive visual stories for lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce brands — from concept and strategy to photography, video, and platform growth. All in-house.


View Portfolio
Get In Touch


















What I Do

## Where Strategy MeetsVisual Artistry


From the first spark of an idea to the final published frame, every project is handled entirely in-house — with the precision of a strategist and the eye of an artist. This is end-to-end social media management and creative production, built for brands that refuse to blend in.
















### Social Media Management


Comprehensive social media management for small businesses and high-end brands alike — from platform strategy and content calendars to community engagement and performance analytics. Every touchpoint is intentional, on-brand, and built to convert.


Content Planning
Analytics
Community
















### Creative Strategy


Purposeful brand storytelling rooted in research and aesthetic clarity. From defining your visual identity to mapping content pillars and campaign arcs, creative direction here means every post serves a bigger narrative — one that resonates deeply with your ideal audience.


Brand Narrative
Campaign Direction
Visual Identity














### Photo & Video Production


Professional photography and video editing entirely in-house — from styled stills for e-commerce and lifestyle brands to Reels, TikToks, and short-form video content. Concept, shoot, edit, and deliver: one creative, zero handoffs, full cohesion.


Photography
Reels & TikTok
Editing




























Selected Work

## Campaigns Built to Be Seen & Sold


Every frame, caption, and cut is crafted with dual intent — visually arresting and commercially intentional. This is social media management as a creative discipline: strategy meets artistry, in-house from concept to final edit.

## Strategy Meets Artistry, All In-House — Aviv Msika

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: Meet Aviv Msika — a multidisciplinary creative strategist, photographer &amp; video editor offering a full social media management service from concept to stunning execution. One vision, zero outsourcing.

Strategy Meets Artistry, All In-House — Aviv Msika






























Skip to main content















- Home
- About Me
- Portfolio
- Clients



Contact
















About Aviv


# Creative StrategyMeets VisualArtistry


I'm Aviv Msika — a multidisciplinary creative who bridges strategic thinking with visual intuition. From concept to final frame, every project is handled entirely in-house: no handoffs, no compromises, just cohesive storytelling that converts. My approach to social media management service goes beyond posting — it's about crafting a brand world your audience can't scroll past.



- ### Digital Marketing Expert Data-informed strategies that grow audiences, deepen engagement, and drive real business results across platforms.

- ### Professional Photographer Warm, luminous imagery for lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce brands — shot with a trained editorial eye.

- ### Videographer & Editor From Reels to full brand films — concept, shoot, and edit under one roof for a seamless creative vision.








































How I Work

## End-to-End, In-House.From First Brief to Final Frame.


Every project is handled entirely in-house — no outsourcing, no handoffs, no guesswork. As a social media management service built around creative ownership, I guide each collaboration through four intentional stages that keep your brand's vision intact from concept through delivery.












01


### Discovery


We begin with a deep-dive into your brand world — your audience, aesthetic, goals, and competitive landscape. This listening phase shapes everything that follows.










02


### Strategy


A tailored content strategy is crafted — content pillars, posting cadence, platform approach, and visual direction — designed to position your brand with clarity and intention.









03


### Production


Photography, videography, and creative direction — all executed by me, on location or in studio. Every frame is composed with the strategy in mind, not just aesthetic instinct.









04


### Edit & Delivery


Post-production, caption writing, scheduling, and performance review — a complete, polished handoff ready to publish. Your feed, elevated and consistent.





























Working Philosophy

## Craft, clarity,and commercial intent.


Every brand I work with receives the same unwavering commitment: strategy that is precise, visuals that are intentional, and execution that leaves nothing to chance. For luxury and lifestyle brands, the difference between good and exceptional lives in the details — and that is exactly where I focus.












### Clarity of Vision


Before a single frame is captured or a caption is written, I map the strategic intent. Every content decision — from colour grading to copy tone — is anchored in a clear brand narrative. Ambiguity is the enemy of elevated social media management service.










### Radical Consistency


Luxury brands are built on trust, and trust is built through consistency. I maintain rigorous visual and tonal coherence across every touchpoint — ensuring your audience recognises you instantly, whether on a feed scroll or a story tap.










### Elevated Execution


From concept to final edit, every project is handled entirely in-house — photography, video, copy, and strategy. This end-to-end ownership means nothing gets lost in translation, and the result always reflects the standard your brand deserves.





































Expertise & Range

## A full-spectrum creative practice — from social media management strategy to final frame.


I work with brands that understand the difference between content that looks good and content that performs. My approach brings together strategic clarity and visual precision across every platform, every format, and every phase of production — handled entirely in-house.


Whether you're a culinary studio, a lifestyle label, or a founder-led e-commerce brand, the result is the same: a cohesive social media management service that elevates how your audience sees you — and moves them to act.











### Strategy & Direction


- Content Strategy Brand-aligned editorial calendars, messaging frameworks, and campaign architecture designed around your audience and business goals.

- Platform Content Direction Native storytelling for Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn — each channel treated as its own creative medium.

- Brand Voice & Positioning Tone, language, and visual identity refined into a consistent, recognisable presence across every touchpoint.








### Photography


- Lifestyle & Editorial Stills that communicate atmosphere — luminous, composed, and crafted for scroll-stopping impact.

- Culinary & Product Food, beverage, and product photography with an eye for light, texture, and brand coherence.

- E-Commerce & Campaign Clean, conversion-ready imagery built for digital storefronts and paid media environments.








### Video Editing


- Reels & Short-Form Paced, music-synced edits optimised for vertical formats and platform algorithms.

- Brand Films & Campaigns Longer-form storytelling that builds emotional resonance and communicates brand values with depth.

- Motion & Colour Grading Cohesive visual language through refined colour treatment and subtle motion design.








### Social Media Management


- Full-Service Account Management End-to-end social media management for small business and high-end brands — from scheduling and community engagement to performance reporting.

- Analytics & Growth Data-informed decisions that translate creative output into measurable audience growth and engagement.

- In-House Production Strategy, capture, edit, and publish — every element handled under one roof for seamless creative continuity.

























Let's create together


## Ready to Build Something Beautiful?


If you're a brand that values intentional storytelling, visual craft, and a truly hands-on creative partnership — let's talk. Aviv works closely with a select roster of lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce clients, offering end-to-end social media management and creative strategy that's as commercially sharp as it is visually stunning.

Contact Aviv

Selected Work


# The Work


A curated collection of social media campaigns, editorial photography, and short-form video content — each project crafted in-house from strategic concept to final production. Spanning stills, reels, and full campaign rollouts for high-end lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce brands.






Campaign direction & photography — Aviv Msika Studio


















## Selected Work


A curated look at campaigns, photography, and reels crafted in-house — from concept to final frame.





Reels
Photography
Campaign Visuals











Reel








































Reel


























Selected Work





## Case Studies


Two campaigns. Two worlds. One creative vision — from strategy to final frame.








01
Lifestyle & Hospitality

### La Maison Dorée — Brand Identity & Social Launch



The Challenge

A boutique Parisian-inspired hotel in Tel Aviv had no social presence and a visual language that failed to reflect its intimate luxury positioning. The brand needed a full social media management strategy that could compete with established lifestyle properties while feeling distinctly personal and artisan.



Creative Direction

Aviv developed an editorial content system built around golden-hour photography, intimate table settings, and a muted warm palette echoing the property's interiors. Every caption was crafted to feel like a handwritten note — inviting, specific, and sensory. Story formats introduced behind-the-scenes moments to humanise the brand.



Content Outcome

Within 90 days: 340% increase in profile visits, 4.8× growth in saves and shares, and a measurable uptick in direct booking enquiries attributed to Instagram. The feed became a destination in itself — consistently cited by guests as the reason they reached out.






340%
Profile Visit Growth


4.8×
Saves & Shares


90
Days to Results




































02
Culinary E-Commerce

### Terroir Goods — Content Strategy & E-Commerce Growth



The Challenge

A premium artisan food e-commerce brand had a world-class product but a fragmented visual identity across channels. Sales were driven almost entirely by word-of-mouth, with no cohesive social media management service in place to convert discovery into purchase. The brand needed content that educated, inspired, and sold — simultaneously.



Creative Direction

Aviv built a content ecosystem anchored in provenance storytelling — the origin of ingredients, the makers behind the products, and the rituals of use. Photography leaned into tactile textures: rough ceramics, golden oils, linen surfaces. Short-form video content was scripted and edited in-house to guide viewers from discovery to the product page in under 15 seconds.



Content Outcome

A 62% increase in website traffic from social channels within the first quarter, with a 28% conversion rate improvement on product pages linked from Instagram. Reels content regularly achieved 3–5× organic reach beyond the existing follower base, establishing the brand as a trusted voice in the gourmet lifestyle category.






62%
Social Traffic Lift


28%
Conversion Uplift


5×
Organic Reach






















Industries & Expertise

## Creative Strategy Tailoredto Your World


Every industry speaks its own visual language. From the warmth of a shared meal to the quiet luxury of a curated lifestyle, Aviv brings a bespoke social media management service that's as fluent in strategy as it is in storytelling.












Lifestyle

### Elevated Everyday Living


Lifestyle brands thrive on aspiration — the feeling that something beautiful is always within reach. Aviv crafts visual narratives that place your audience inside a world they want to inhabit: airy, intentional, and unmistakably you. From mood-driven photography to scroll-stopping Reels, every post is designed to build an emotional connection that converts followers into loyal communities.










Culinary

### Food That Tells a Story


Great culinary content makes people hungry before they've even read the caption. Aviv's approach to restaurant and gourmet food brands balances artful composition with genuine appetite appeal — warm tones, deliberate textures, and a creative strategy that builds anticipation around your menu, your chefs, and the full sensory experience of dining with you.










Luxury E-Commerce

### Products Worth Coveting


In luxury e-commerce, the image is the product. Aviv's in-house creative process — from strategic planning through photography and video editing — ensures your brand communicates exclusivity at every touchpoint. The result is a cohesive social presence that drives discovery, desire, and purchase intent without ever compromising the elevated aesthetic your customers expect.



















Let's Create Together

## Have a Project in Mind?


Every brand has a story worth telling beautifully. Whether you need end-to-end social media management, bespoke content creation, or a full creative strategy tailored to your vision — Aviv brings both the artistic eye and the commercial mind to make it happen, entirely in-house.

Start the Conversation

Clients & Collaborations


# Brands That Trustthe Vision


Aviv Msika partners with premium lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce brands as a full-service social media management and creative strategy studio — bringing every project to life entirely in-house, from concept and photography to final production. These are the brands and founders who chose to elevate their story.






Featured Collaborations

Client Impressions


## Words From ThoseWho've Worked Closely


A curated selection of reflections from brands and founders who entrusted their creative vision to Aviv's social media management service — from concept through production.













"Aviv completely transformed how our brand shows up online. Her strategic eye combined with hands-on production meant we never had to explain the brief twice — she simply understood the world we were building and elevated it beyond what we imagined. Our engagement tripled within the first quarter."



SL



### Sophie Laurent

Founder, Fine Dining Concept — Paris & Tel Aviv
















"What sets Aviv apart is the rare combination of creative excellence and commercial intelligence. She doesn't just make content look beautiful — she engineers it to perform. As a luxury e-commerce brand, we needed someone who could hold both the aesthetic standard and the growth strategy simultaneously. Aviv does that effortlessly."



NB



### Noa Ben-David

Creative Director, Luxury E-Commerce Label
















"Working with Aviv felt less like hiring a social media management agency and more like gaining a true creative partner who deeply cared about our story. Her photography and video editing brought our culinary brand to life in a way that felt authentic, aspirational, and entirely our own. The professionalism at every stage was exceptional."



MR



### Marco Rossi

Owner, Artisan Culinary Brand & Restaurant Group


























Brand Alignment

## Who Aviv Works Best With


Aviv partners with a carefully selected roster of brands — not every business, but the right ones. If you're a founder, marketing director, or brand manager looking for a hands-on creative partner who handles everything from strategic social media management to in-house production, you're in the right place.


The most successful collaborations happen when a brand has a clear vision and the ambition to elevate it. Aviv brings the creative execution, strategic framework, and visual storytelling to make that vision a reality — end to end, with no handoffs or guesswork.















### Premium Positioning


Your brand operates — or aspires to operate — in the lifestyle, culinary, beauty, or e-commerce premium tier. You understand that quality content is an investment, not an expense, and you're ready to show up with intention across every platform.











### Visual Ambition


You care deeply about how your brand looks and feels online. Whether you need a full social media management service overhaul or a refined content strategy, you value cohesive aesthetics, original photography, and storytelling that resonates — not just fills a grid.











### Strategic Growth


You're building something with longevity in mind. You want a creative partner who thinks beyond the post — someone who connects content to community, brand identity to business outcomes, and creative vision to measurable growth on the platforms that matter most to your audience.









Social Media Management & Creative Strategy

Crafting purposeful digital narratives that blend artistic vision with commercial clarity. Let's build something beautiful together.

### Thoughtful Replies


Every inquiry is read with care. You can expect a considered, personal response within 48 hours — because your project deserves more than a template reply.










### A Bespoke Approach


No two brands are alike. Every collaboration begins with deep listening — understanding your vision, your audience, and your goals — before a single creative decision is made.










### Premium Brand Focus


Aviv specialises in high-end lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce brands. If you are building something refined and ambitious, you have found the right social media management partner.

Every great brand story begins with intention. Whether you're building from the ground up or refining your presence, I bring end-to-end creative direction — from strategic concept to final production — entirely in-house. No handoffs, no diluted vision. Just focused, meaningful work crafted with care for the clients who deserve it most.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy


















Trusted By


## Brands, Collaborations & Valued Partnerships


Proud to work alongside premium lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce clients who value intentional storytelling and refined social media management.







# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/29/2026



Aviv Msika ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Aviv Msika

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement


















Trusted By


## Brands, Collaborations & Valued Partnerships


Proud to work alongside premium lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce clients who value intentional storytelling and refined social media management.







# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 29, 2026



Aviv Msika is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Aviv Msika

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions


















Trusted By


## Brands, Collaborations & Valued Partnerships


Proud to work alongside premium lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce clients who value intentional storytelling and refined social media management.







# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 29, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Aviv Msika

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Social Media Management & Creative Strategy provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Aviv Msika provides Social Media Management & Creative Strategy through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Aviv Msika. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Aviv Msika

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
